nasb.text: But as for you, go your way to the end; then you will enter into rest and rise again for your allotted portion at the end of the age.”

esv.text: But go your way till the end. And you shall rest and shall stand in your allotted place at the end of the days.”

cnv.text: 你應去等待結局！你必安歇；到了末日，你必起來，承受你的分。”

ccb.text: 你要坚持到底。你必得到安息，到了末后的日子，你必起来承受你的产业。”
